description_long: This is a green metal shopping trolley with a wireframe construction, commonly found in supermarkets and urban retail environments. The trolley features a large main basket for carrying goods, with a smaller upper basket near the handle for delicate or smaller items. It is supported by four wheels, allowing for easy maneuverability across flat surfaces. The handle is a single horizontal bar, coated for grip and comfort, and is attached to the rear of the trolley. The lower section includes a flat platform for carrying larger or heavier items that may not fit in the basket. The overall design is utilitarian, with open wire sides and a robust frame for durability.
description: A green wireframe shopping trolley with a large basket, a smaller upper basket, four wheels, and a single horizontal handlebar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main basket, smaller upper basket, and the handlebar clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main basket, the flat lower platform, and the wheel arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the open structure of the basket and the handlebar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the basket depth, platform, and wheel configuration.
attribute_handle_type: single bar handle, cylindrical, coated with plastic for grip, ergonomic and robust
attribute_wheel_arrangement: four wheels, all at the corners, likely all swivel for maneuverability
